intentSynonyms: read messages from a thread in discord
description: Read messages from a thread. Threads are channels, so this works the same as read_messages but is semantically specific to threads.

thread_id.description: Thread (channel) ID to read messages from

limit.description: Number of messages to return (default 50, max 100)

before.description: Get messages before this message ID (for pagination)

after.description: Get messages after this message ID
